scripts.deploy:staging: npm run sync:assets && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run sync:assets && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:dry-run:staging: npm run sync:assets && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env staging
scripts.deploy:dry-run:production: npm run sync:assets && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env production
scripts.d1:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging
scripts.d1:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production
